case_title: ALFREDO B GOMEZ VS. THE CAVALIER, SF, LLC

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-07-2017 - JUDGMENT.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT THE CAVALIER, SF, LLC

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-07-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-07-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY JAMES NICHOLAS, OWNER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. BERTELSEN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,546.00 FILED BY GOMEZ, ALFREDO B AS TO DEFENDANT THE CAVALIER, SF, LLC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-07-2017 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GOMEZ, ALFREDO B IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT THE CAVALIER, SF, LLC THE PLAINTIFF DID NOT MEET HIS BURDEN OF PROOF BY A PREPONDERANCE OF THE EVIDENCE THAT AN ACT OR OMISSION OF THE DEFENDANT WAS A CAUSE OF PLAINTIFF'S LOSS, DAMAGE OR HARM. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SEE SIGNATURE CARD) SERVED SEP-14-2017, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT THE CAVALIER, SF, LLC

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF GOMEZ, ALFREDO B ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
